data.content: Shipment review approved. Commit e483701c2e76 verified on main. CI green (Changesets failure pre-existing). All three scripts pass bash -n syntax check. Changes scoped to install.sh, agent-wizard.sh, setup.sh with TTY-aware color/emoji formatting, NO_COLOR/CI gates, and UTF-8 fallbacks. No invariants to verify. No regressions detected.
